{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323060501A9CB812F762F3C74D256"}"},"total":60},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7525717001896919833","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"赵淑芬的故事太真实了，简直就是我大姨的翻版。现在年轻人总说婆婆难相处，可有多少像徐静这样的儿媳把婆婆当免费保姆还挑三拣四，最可气的是林波这种儿子装聋作哑的样子真让人心寒。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752223235,"group_id":"7510491347984337945","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2EG3ohHbQKQOnr+chzKLDige9/VKinXTsQeQ4qsMU6n","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1988333611540151","user_name":"爱吃南京鸭的宋统文"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1988333611540151","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7510491347984337945","book_info":{"abstract":"《窒息的亲情》
赵淑芬是个普通的退休女工，含辛茹苦将儿子林波拉扯大，本以为晚年能享天伦之乐，却不想儿子的婚姻成了她噩梦的开始。儿媳许静家境优渥、学历高、性格强势，从初见起就对婆婆充满轻视。婚后，赵淑芬搬进儿子家帮忙，却成了“免费保姆”，处处受儿媳刁难——做的饭菜被嫌弃，生活习惯被挑剔，甚至连呼吸都成了错。儿子林波性格懦弱，面对妻子的跋扈和母亲的委屈，只会沉默逃避。  
孙女出生后，矛盾彻底爆发。许静禁止婆婆靠近孩子，动辄辱骂，甚至砸碎老伴留下的遗物。赵淑芬忍气吞声，只盼儿子能硬气一回，可等来的却是许静逼她卖掉养老房的算计。当压抑的亲情变成枷锁，这个家早已名存实亡……  
一部撕开中国式家庭伪和睦的现实之作，探讨亲情捆绑下的窒息与挣扎。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/30b6f6dba4d64fd4cdc3c5db8f42e6b9","author":"红棒棒和蓝棒棒","author_id":"","book_id":"7510491347984337945","book_name":"婆媳的战国","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#808890","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7972人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":125,"name":"家庭","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=125&name=家庭&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":862,"name":"家长里短","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=862&name=家长里短&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7510491444822409753","read_count":"7972","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"324656"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"92","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,家庭,家长里短,第一人称","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cfff03e189ef3945567676937dbc0f7b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779401101&x-signature=1PUKYGx0x5OsYlPixV%2BV%2BwyPF64%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3298984241140461","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"58"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323060501A9CB812F762F3C74D256"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1300,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8982,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3818},"user_action":{
